candidates.why: This is the only explicit COGS-related D&A row visible. However, it appears as a component within the Cost of Sales / Cost of revenues/COGS bucket, while the already selected COGS rows are total COGS labels. Adding it separately would likely double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket consists of total COGS rows ('Cost of revenues/COGS' and 'Cost of Revenues'). The explicit COGS D&A line appears nested as a sub-component of Cost of Sales/COGS rather than a separate same-level expense to add.

candidates.why: Visible explicit D&A row is clearly tied to COR/COGS, not SG&A. No SG&A/admin/selling/R&D D&A row is shown in the excerpt.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A-related depreciation or amortisation row is visible above the EBIT-like cutoff. The only D&A line shown belongs to COGS, so nothing should be added separately to XSGA_COMPONENTS.
